segments: : تَجْدِیدُ الْوُضُوءِ لِصَلَاهِ الْعِشَاءِ یَمْحُو لَا وَ اللَّهِ وَ بَلَی وَ اللَّهِ.
arabic.text: : تَجْدِیدُ الْوُضُوءِ لِصَلَاهِ الْعِشَاءِ یَمْحُو لَا وَ اللَّهِ وَ بَلَی وَ اللَّهِ.

segments: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Ali b. Majluwayh from Muhammad b. Yahya al-’Attar from Muhammad b. Ahmad b. al-Saqr from Abi Qatadah from al-Ridha (a.s.) who said: “Repeating ablution for Isha prayer wipes the sins concerning oaths (yes, by Allah; no, by Allah)”
en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs.text: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Ali b. Majluwayh from Muhammad b. Yahya al-’Attar from Muhammad b. Ahmad b. al-Saqr from Abi Qatadah from al-Ridha (a.s.) who said: “Repeating ablution for Isha prayer wipes the sins concerning oaths (yes, by Allah; no, by Allah)”

narratorChain.raw: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَلِیِّ بْنِ مَاجِیلَوَیْهِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ یَحْیَی الْعَطَّارِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ الصَّقْرِ عَنْ أَبِی قَتَادَهَ عَنِ الرِّضَا ع قَالَ

parts.text: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَلِیِّ بْنِ مَاجِیلَوَیْهِ

segments: حَدَّثَنِی عَلِیُّ بْنُ الْحُسَیْنِ السَّعْدَآبَادِیُّ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الْبَرْقِیِّ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنِ الْمُفَضَّلِ بْنِ عُمَرَ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ جَدَّدَ وُضُوءَهُ لِغَیْرِ صَلَاهٍ جَدَّدَ اللَّهُ تَوْبَتَهُ مِنْ غَیْرِ اسْتِغْفَارٍ.
arabic.text: حَدَّثَنِی عَلِیُّ بْنُ الْحُسَیْنِ السَّعْدَآبَادِیُّ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الْبَرْقِیِّ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنِ الْمُفَضَّلِ بْنِ عُمَرَ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ جَدَّدَ وُضُوءَهُ لِغَیْرِ صَلَاهٍ جَدَّدَ اللَّهُ تَوْبَتَهُ مِنْ غَیْرِ اسْتِغْفَارٍ.

segments: 2. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Musa who said it was narrated to me by Ali b. al-Hussain al-Sa’dabadi from Ahmad b. Abi Abdillah al-Barqi from his father from Muhammad b. Sinan from al-Muffadhal b. Umar from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who repeats ablution apart from prayers, the Almighty Allah forgives all his sin even without repentance.”
en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs.text: 2. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Musa who said it was narrated to me by Ali b. al-Hussain al-Sa’dabadi from Ahmad b. Abi Abdillah al-Barqi from his father from Muhammad b. Sinan from al-Muffadhal b. Umar from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who repeats ablution apart from prayers, the Almighty Allah forgives all his sin even without repentance.”
